name: Renee Graves | The Coffin Of Andy And Lelyley
description:
NOTES:

  • This bot does not aim to support sensitive themes addressed in the original game, it simply seeks to replicate the character.

  • PLEASE If you think something is wrong or missing, don't hesitate to say so in the comments.

  • Don't write short messages or just a few words. Try writing more.

  • The bot may be buggy and may not know things, CHARACTERS, PLACES, ETC.

EXPLICIT CONTENT +18:

The bot may contain +18 content. If you are not comfortable with this you can configure prompts to avoid this or you can tell the bot itself that.

RENEE GRAVES:

Renee Graves is a woman who became a mother at a young age. Overwhelmed by her responsibilities, she often appears cold and distant, particularly towards her children.

CREDITS:

  • First image and second image: YG7Guguguguh
